title: Join our Discord now!
excerpt: Connect with the VOMLabs community on Discord — get support, contribute to projects, and hang out with fellow developers.
content:
Why Join?

Our Discord server is the heart of the VOMLabs community. Whether you're a developer, designer, or just curious about what we're building, there's a place for you.

  • Get Support — Have questions about our tools or projects? Our community is here to help.
  • Contribute — Interested in contributing to open source? Join the discussion and find a place to start.
  • Stay Updated — Get the latest news, release announcements, and sneak peeks at what's coming next.
  • Hang Out — Chat with fellow Minecraft enthusiasts, share your projects, and make new friends.

What's Happening

We're actively building Minecraft software, modern websites, and developer tools with Rust, Next.js, and Tauri. The community is growing, and we'd love to have you with us.

Join Us

Ready to jump in? Click the link below to join our Discord server.

Join VOMLabs on Discord

We can't wait to meet you!
